rules: Move: NewPos = currentPos + dir. Valid if 0 <= NewPos.x < width AND 0 <= NewPos.y < height AND NewPos is not occupied by any enemy in the current enemies list.
Attack Failure: Log 'Attack failed: Target [id] not adjacent or does not exist' if target is not orthogonally adjacent or id not found.
Damage Application: IncomingDamage is subtracted from hero.mana. If IncomingDamage > hero.mana, hero.hp is reduced by (IncomingDamage - hero.mana) and hero.mana is set to 0.
Anomaly Trigger: If hero.mana was > 0 and becomes <= 0 after an attack, all enemies orthogonally adjacent to the hero take anomaly_dmg.
Win/Loss Priority: If hero.hp <= 0, status = 'DEFEAT' immediately, even if all enemies are also dead. If enemies list is empty and hero.hp > 0, status = 'VICTORY'.

Log Requirements: Move success: 'Hero moved to [x,y]'; Move failure: 'Move failed: [reason]'; Attack: 'Hero attacks Enemy [id]'; Rupture: 'Mana Shield ruptured! Anomaly deals [dmg] to adjacent enemies'; Damage: 'Hero takes [dmg] damage'.

files.description: Handles CLI arguments (--scenario N), loads the initial state, and invokes the engine to process the action queue.
Contains the deterministic logic for processing actions, managing the grid, calculating damage, and evaluating game status.
